title: senecio hirtus
intro: Senecio hirtus, also known as rough Jacob's ladder or hairy ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio hirtus include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and even treat certain types of skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
